case_title: BING ELLIOT XIA VS. NEDA MESHKIN DR

docket_entries.description: ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING - GRANTED.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S AMENDED CLAIM; WHICH WAS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE ON 5/6/14 BY PLAINTIFF.
